title: Subscription Plans
description: Choose the subscription plan that suits you so you can publish your service.
choose_plan: Choose the subscription plan that suits you:
payment_gateway_title: You are about to proceed to the payment gateway!
payment_gateway_description: Are you sure you want to continue to the payment gateway?
auto_renew_notice: - The subscription renews automatically unless canceled
payment_notification_notice: - You will be notified via email and the platform to confirm the monthly payment

payment_failed.title: Payment failed
payment_failed.description: We couldn't complete the payment. Please try again

payment_success.success_description: Prepare your account, review your details, and start publishing your services!
payment_success.error_description: We encountered an issue verifying your subscription!

extra_payment_success.error_description: An error occurred while processing the payment. Please try again.
extra_payment_success.success_description: An extra service slot has been added to your account successfully. You can now post a new service.
extra_payment_success.what_happened_description: You purchased an additional service after reaching the maximum number of services allowed by your current subscription.
